claim.summary: Refine OpenClaw receipts: claim extraction + actor.model (closes #1, #2)
claim.details: Centralized claim/model logic in src/openclaw-receipt.js shared by the CLI converter and the plugin. Claims now prefer the originating task request plus a tool-action summary and avoid trivial trailing lines like 'done'. The plugin caches model_call_started/model_call_ended provider+model per runId and resolves actor.model on agent_end, recording integrations.openclaw.model_source. Verified live after gateway restart.

evidence.label: live verification
evidence.note: Live verification receipt rcpt_20260623_131512_c0237a: claim reflects task + '1 tool call: exec'; actor.model='sakana/fugu'; model_source='model_call_hook'.

recommended_next_action: Review the receipt and supporting evidence.
